summary: Iteration 74: Tested patch-verification.js module for preventing false 'Done' responses. All 51 tests passed (27 unit tests + 24 code inspection tests). The patch-verification module correctly implements extractExpectedChanges for parsing heading/section/form/removal requests, verifyPatchResult for checking code against expected changes, and buildVerifiedPatchResponse for structured output. The 4 main completion sites in message-stream.js (PlanValidator revised, SelfCritique revised, auto-execute inline, direct edit success) correctly use buildVerifiedPatchResponse. However, 6 'Done —' strings remain in fallback/edge-case paths that were not specified for replacement.

minor.issue: 6 'Done —' strings remain in fallback paths (lines 1403, 1426, 1427, 1481, 1535, 1592) that were not specified for replacement in the requirements

action_items: OPTIONAL: Replace remaining 6 'Done —' strings in message-stream.js fallback paths (lines 1403, 1426, 1427, 1481, 1535, 1592) with buildVerifiedPatchResponse calls for complete coverage
